title: Geonosian spear
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Geonosian spear''' was a melee weapon produced by [[Gordarl Weaponsmiths/Legends|Gordarl Weaponsmiths]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], and commonly used by [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] warriors.

The Geonosian spear measured approximately 1.8 meters in length, and was crafted from hollow bone coated with a protective resin. These weapons were designed to fend off large predators, and came to be used in gladiatorial arenas such as the [[Petranaki arena]], to control creatures and prisoners. Since the spear was sharp enough to pierce tough hide and thick fur, wielders trained to strike a beast's most vulnerable area—such as the soft underside of the [[Reek/Legends|reek's]] neck.

The Geonosian spear had been superseded by the electrically-charged [[Static pike/Legends|static pike]] by the time of the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], though the traditional spear was still in use among sentries and warriors on Geonosis.
